studio_flatcms_drawer_structure_subtitle: Create the page skeleton before refining content.
studio_flatcms_drawer_elements_subtitle: Insert content primitives into the current layout.
studio_flatcms_drawer_shell_subtitle: Control global regions such as the optional aside.
studio_flatcms_drawer_page_subtitle: Reset or rebaseline the working document.
studio_flatcms_empty_selection: Select a region or node to edit it.
studio_flatcms_empty_dropzone: This area is ready to receive the next Studio elements.
studio_flatcms_noscript: Studio requires JavaScript to render the workbench.
studio_flatcms_card_add_section_copy: Add a structured section to the main flow before detailing its content.
studio_flatcms_card_add_text_copy: Insert a text block into the currently targeted canvas area.
studio_flatcms_card_add_buttons_copy: Append a horizontal actions row inside the selected structure.
studio_flatcms_card_toggle_aside_copy: Enable or disable the supporting region without forcing the aside into the layout.
studio_flatcms_card_reset_document_copy: Reload the starter document locally before the next save.
studio_flatcms_text_hint: Text is edited directly on the canvas. Use the frame here to adjust its area and placement.
studio_flatcms_menu_hint: The menu still follows its native source for now. The frame already lets you adjust its footprint and placement.
studio_flatcms_effects_empty: Effects will land once the shared node contract is stabilized.
studio_flatcms_responsive_empty: Responsive overrides are planned for the next Studio phases.
studio_flatcms_preview_pending: Preview will be connected after the frontend resolver phase.
studio_flatcms_save_error: Unable to save the Studio document.
studio_flatcms_default_heading: Build the next FlatCMS Studio from a clean contract.
studio_flatcms_default_body: This starter canvas keeps the validated shell while resetting the engine, storage, and inspector model on stable native module boundaries.
studio_flatcms_default_aside: Optional supporting content can live in the aside when the layout requires it.
studio_flatcms_tour_topbar: This top bar keeps the editing mode, devices, zoom, preview, and save actions together.
studio_flatcms_tour_rail: The left rail opens focused drawers instead of permanent side columns.
studio_flatcms_tour_canvas: The central canvas is the main editing surface and stays structurally aligned with the page shell.
studio_flatcms_tour_inspector: The right inspector is the single place for content, layout, design, effects, and responsive controls.
